title: Undead King limited summons a cemetery creature on 3-6

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, you may summon a creature from your cemetery as a Limited Summon. Limited Summon(s) return to the cemetery if this card leaves the field, switches control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Undead King limited summons a cemetery creature on 3-6
plan.summary: Activate Undead King, force a successful die result, and verify a cemetery creature can be selected and Limited Summoned.

notes: Place Undead King on player_1 field as primary.
Put an Undead creature in player_1 cemetery before activating.

steps: Activate Undead King during player_1 turn.
Choose a creature from player_1 cemetery as a Limited Summon.

expectedAssertions.label: Resolution used Undead King Limited Summon action

manualVerification: The Limited Summon should come from your cemetery only and remain linked to Undead King.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_004_undead_king-004-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
